metadata.description: Plugins from Infinite Solutions — starting with Cowork Vault.

plugins.name: cowork-vault
plugins.description: Turns a folder of Markdown agent prompts into a structured Cowork vault: governance docs, normalized skills, memory layout, inbox/outbox routing, and a starter pack so the user has something working in the first thirty minutes. Optional realtor pack adds transaction skills that file emailed documents, update an Asana checklist, and draft client email.
